moves.name: The Hammer
moves.desc: Price; Four hundred billion dollars. A slow, powerful beam that nearly garauntees a sleep status.

moves.name: Weave
moves.desc: Price; 7.54 billion dollars per teleport. A series of rapid teleportation whilst healing, chance for confusion.

moves.name: Re-animen
moves.desc: Price; estimately 1 trillion for the entire fleet. Advanced, humanoid robots that overwhelm the enemy.

moves.name: Bomb Squad
moves.desc: Prics; unknown. Soldiers surround the enemy, planting bombs which will explode.

moves.name: Kill Switch
moves.desc: Price; IDK like 2k for production??? A supersonic noise device capable of bringing most anyone to their knees.
